title: The Lively Set
writer: Mel Goldberg, William Wood, William Alland
actors: James Darren, Pamela Tiffin, Doug McClure
plot: Casey Owens (James Darren), a young mechanic, has developed a design for a turbine car engine, paving the way for a jet-powered auto certain to set a new land speed record. Wealthy playboy Stanford Rogers (Peter Mann) hires Casey ...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
